title: Japanese Language Proficiency Test
wikitext:
[]: Japanese Language Proficiency Test             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Dec 09, 2011 10:44 am Said to be a question from the listening test of Japan Language Proficiency Test level N1 (highest level). Don't know how true it is... http://youtu.be/xQijUvYSvK4 The comment even said that "the foreigners who heard this question were so happy"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Dec 09, 2011 11:42 am I laughed so hard at that! Thanks!

[]: Re: Japanese Language Proficiency Test             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Fri Dec 09, 2011 1:13 pm symbv wrote: Said to be a question from the listening test of Japan Language Proficiency Test level N1 (highest level). Don't know how true it is... http://youtu.be/xQijUvYSvK4 The comment even said that "the foreigners who heard this question were so happy"

[]: Re: Japanese Language Proficiency Test             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Dec 09, 2011 1:23 pm Fireand'chutes77 wrote: Interesting mash-up of clips, as well... I don't think Gendo ever even spoke to Asuka by name during the series, but here it's like she's the protagonist

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Dec 09, 2011 5:23 pm Actually when I think about it does Asuka even appear in the same shot as gendo anywhere in the series except the 'congratulations' wide shot in 26? Im struggling to think of many scene when they appear in the same room (i.e. Asuka not in an Eva or a test chamber). The only one that comes to mind is when she and Shinji crash through the vent in ep11 and gendos busy manually activated the evas.

[]: Re: Japanese Language Proficiency Test             Quote Post by symbv » Sat Dec 10, 2011 11:25 am Fireand'chutes77 wrote: What questions are they actually asking about this scene?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 10, 2011 11:32 am What I want to know is how come Asuka is being ordered to pilot EVA-04, when we only see 00 and 02.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Sat Dec 10, 2011 12:07 pm Mr. Tines wrote: What I want to know is how come Asuka is being ordered to pilot EVA-04, when we only see 00 and 02.
